name: google-ads-setup
description: Google Ads campaign SETUP / build skills for Inbound CPH: take a new client from research to a launch-ready campaign. Five skills: campaign-build (the orchestrator — runs the full Phase 1->4 pipeline by dispatching a subagent per phase reference, ending in Ian's 10-tab Excel review workbook; owns the whole-campaign entry point), plus four phase skills that also run standalone — research (Phase 1: landing-page positioning + competitor analysis + campaign strategy/settings, one merged skill, emits a .docx report solo), structuring (Phase 2: ad-groups + keywords + negatives gate, emits an .xlsx solo), assets (Phase 3: sitelinks/callouts/structured snippets, emits an .xlsx solo), and responsive-search-ads (the RSA copy engine the build reuses per ad group; also used cross-plugin by google-ads-optimization). The full pipeline merges into a polished, client-shareable 10-tab review workbook — Excel-only, no CSV, no API push; Editor CSVs come from google-ads-general's editor-csv-export. The assembler lives inside campaign-build (references + scripts/assemble.py), not as a standalone skill. Initialization-focused: no live-account optimization here (see google-ads-optimization). Danish-default.

inbound_root_folder_id.title: Inbound CPH Drive folder ID
inbound_root_folder_id.description: The Google Drive folder ID for the inbound-cph/ root folder where all client folders live. Defaults to the shared agency folder. Override only if you have a different mount.
